entries.title: 10-Minute Focus Timer - Micro Sessions | Superfocus
entries.description: 10-minute focus timer for micro sessions. Quick sprints when 15 min feels too long. Perfect for ADHD and rapid task switching.
entries.h1: 10-Minute Focus Timer: Micro Sessions That Work
entries.painPoints:
Need ultra-short blocks?
15 min still too long?
Quick wins between meetings?
entries.recommendedSounds: White noise or minimal lofi for short bursts

entries.title: 20-Minute Focus Timer - Short Deep Work | Superfocus
entries.description: 20-minute focus timer for short deep work. Between Pomodoro and Sprint. Ideal when 25 min feels too long.
entries.h1: 20-Minute Focus Timer: Short Deep Work Blocks
entries.painPoints:
25 min too long?
Need something between 15 and 25?
Quick focus without full Pomodoro?
entries.recommendedSounds: Lofi or rain for sustained 20-min blocks

entries.title: 30-Minute Focus Timer - Balanced Work Blocks | Superfocus
entries.description: 30-minute focus timer for balanced work blocks. Longer than Pomodoro, shorter than Flow. Custom timer in Superfocus.
entries.painPoints:
Want more than 25 min?
45 min too long?
Need a middle ground?

entries.title: 35-Minute Focus Timer - Extended Pomodoro | Superfocus
entries.description: 35-minute focus timer: extended Pomodoro for flow state. Custom block between 25 and 45 min. Try in Superfocus.
entries.painPoints:
25 min cuts you off?
45 min too taxing?
Find your sweet spot
entries.recommendedSounds: Lofi or rain for extended flow

entries.title: 40-Minute Focus Timer - Pre-Flow Sessions | Superfocus
entries.description: 40-minute focus timer for pre-flow sessions. Almost Flowtime length. Build focus stamina with Superfocus custom timers.
entries.painPoints:
Building up to 45 min?
Need slightly less than Flow?
Gradual extension of focus

entries.title: 50-Minute Focus Timer - Near Ultradian | Superfocus
entries.description: 50-minute focus timer: near-ultradian rhythm. Between 45 and 52 min. Custom timer for your natural cycles.
entries.painPoints:
Between 45 and 52 min?
Match your focus cycle?
Custom work blocks
entries.recommendedSounds: Lofi or ambient for deep 50-min sessions
